about.headline: I believe in the power of
about.description: Hi, I'm Nauval Dhonand Sidiq, a web developer based in Banda Aceh. By bridging the gap between aesthetics and engineering, I build digital experiences that are blazingly fast, deeply intuitive, and utterly memorable.

services.title: What I Do
services.subtitle: Crafting digital experiences with precision, passion, and performance.
services.emptyDesc: I'm currently defining my core service packages to better serve your needs. Check back soon.

choose.title: Why Me?

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
